name: Transurban Group
analysis: TCL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$15.0600, stop A$14.4936, target A$16.7592 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
